def: An officer who presides over the academic senate of a Germanuniversity. Heyse.

A clutch fitted in the rear hub of a cycle, which engages therear sprocket with the rear wheel when the pedals are rotatedforwards, but permits the rear wheel to run on free from the rearsprocket when the pedals are stopped or rotated backwards.Freewheelcycles are usually fitted with hub brakes or rim brakes,operated by back pedaling.
Having the property of dimorphism; dimorphous.
The larva of a bee. [Prov. Eng.]
A small collection of sheaves set up in the field; a shock; inEngland, twelve sheaves.
